languages.original_text: "A superb question! It is quite difficult to explain to a layperson, but I will try. To put it quite crudely, Nuncius helps me to think. He constitutes an exceptionally complex network of algorithms that augment my own. They contain conflicting points of view that seek out flaws in my reasoning, and information that is more useful to me if it is not kept in my own head, so I delegate it to him. He is wholly unique."

languages.text: "Прекрасный вопрос! Это довольно сложно объяснить мирян{mf|ину|ке}, но я попытаюсь. Если говорить совсем грубо, Нунциус помогает мне думать. Он представляет из себя необычайно сложную сеть алгоритмов, которые дополняют мои собственные. Они содержат противоречащие точки зрения, которые ищут изъяны в моих рассуждениях, и информацию, которую мне полезнее не держать в голове, поэтому я делегирую ее ему. Он весьма уникален".

languages.text: «¡Una pregunta excelente! No es sencillo explicárselo a un{mf||a} laic{mf|o|a}, pero Nuncius me ayuda a pensar. Constituye una red de algoritmos excepcionalmente compleja que aumenta la mía. Contiene distintos puntos de vista que me ayudan a buscar errores en mis razonamientos e información que es más útil fuera de mi propia cabeza, por lo que se la delego. Es totalmente único».
languages.original_text: "A superb question! It is quite difficult to explain to a layperson, but I will try. To put it quite crudely, Nuncius helps me to think. He constitutes an exceptionally complex network of algorithms that augment my own. They contain conflicting points of view that seek out flaws in my reasoning, and information that is more useful to me if it is not kept in my own head, so I delegate it to him. He is wholly unique."

traits.locale_text: «¡Una pregunta excelente! No es sencillo explicárselo a un{mf||a} laic{mf|o|a}, pero Nuncius me ayuda a pensar. Constituye una red de algoritmos excepcionalmente compleja que aumenta la mía. Contiene distintos puntos de vista que me ayudan a buscar errores en mis razonamientos e información que es más útil fuera de mi propia cabeza, por lo que se la delego. Es totalmente único».

languages.text: “好问题！向教外人士解释起来相当困难，但我会尽量解释。说得粗浅一点，努恩修斯帮助我思考。他构成了一套异常复杂的算法网络，用以增强我自身的算法。其中包含彼此冲突的观点，专门用于挑我逻辑中的漏洞，还有一些不适合放在我自己脑子里的信息，于是我交由他处理。他是独一无二的存在。”
languages.original_text: "A superb question! It is quite difficult to explain to a layperson, but I will try. To put it quite crudely, Nuncius helps me to think. He constitutes an exceptionally complex network of algorithms that augment my own. They contain conflicting points of view that seek out flaws in my reasoning, and information that is more useful to me if it is not kept in my own head, so I delegate it to him. He is wholly unique."

traits.locale_text: “好问题！向教外人士解释起来相当困难，但我会尽量解释。说得粗浅一点，努恩修斯帮助我思考。他构成了一套异常复杂的算法网络，用以增强我自身的算法。其中包含彼此冲突的观点，专门用于挑我逻辑中的漏洞，还有一些不适合放在我自己脑子里的信息，于是我交由他处理。他是独一无二的存在。”

languages.text: « Excellente question ! C'est assez compliqué à comprendre pour {mf|un|une} profane, mais je vais faire de mon mieux pour vous l'expliquer. En termes simples, Nuncius m'aide à réfléchir. Il présente un réseau incroyablement complexe d'algorithmes renforçant les miens. Ils contiennent des points de vue contradictoires mettant en lumière des failles dans mes raisonnements, et des informations m'étant plus utiles ailleurs que dans ma propre tête et que je lui confie donc. Il est tout simplement unique. »
languages.original_text: "A superb question! It is quite difficult to explain to a layperson, but I will try. To put it quite crudely, Nuncius helps me to think. He constitutes an exceptionally complex network of algorithms that augment my own. They contain conflicting points of view that seek out flaws in my reasoning, and information that is more useful to me if it is not kept in my own head, so I delegate it to him. He is wholly unique."

traits.locale_text: « Excellente question ! C'est assez compliqué à comprendre pour {mf|un|une} profane, mais je vais faire de mon mieux pour vous l'expliquer. En termes simples, Nuncius m'aide à réfléchir. Il présente un réseau incroyablement complexe d'algorithmes renforçant les miens. Ils contiennent des points de vue contradictoires mettant en lumière des failles dans mes raisonnements, et des informations m'étant plus utiles ailleurs que dans ma propre tête et que je lui confie donc. Il est tout simplement unique. »

languages.text: "Eine großartige Frage! Es ist recht schwierig, das einem Laien zu erklären, aber ich werde es versuchen. Einfach gesagt hilft mir Nuncius beim Denken. Er besteht aus einem außergewöhnlich komplexen Netzwerk aus Algorithmen, die meine eigenen optimieren. Sie umfassen widersprüchliche Sichtweisen, die Schwächen in meiner Argumentation aufzeigen, und Informationen, die für mich hilfreicher sind, wenn ich sie nicht in meinem eigenen Kopf speichere. Also delegiere ich sie an ihn. Er ist absolut einzigartig."
languages.original_text: "A superb question! It is quite difficult to explain to a layperson, but I will try. To put it quite crudely, Nuncius helps me to think. He constitutes an exceptionally complex network of algorithms that augment my own. They contain conflicting points of view that seek out flaws in my reasoning, and information that is more useful to me if it is not kept in my own head, so I delegate it to him. He is wholly unique."

Also delegiere ich sie an ihn. Er ist absolut einzigartig."

languages.text: 「見事な質問だ！素人に説明するのはかなり難しいが、やってみよう。ざっくり言うと、ヌンシウスは私の思考を助けてくれる。ヌンシウスは私の思考を補強する非常に複雑なアルゴリズムのネットワークを構成している。私の推論の欠点を探し出す相反する視点や、私自身の頭の中に留めておかない方が有益な情報を含んでいるので、私はそれを彼に委ねる。彼は完全にユニークな存在だ」。
languages.original_text: "A superb question! It is quite difficult to explain to a layperson, but I will try. To put it quite crudely, Nuncius helps me to think. He constitutes an exceptionally complex network of algorithms that augment my own. They contain conflicting points of view that seek out flaws in my reasoning, and information that is more useful to me if it is not kept in my own head, so I delegate it to him. He is wholly unique."

languages.text: "Mükemmel bir soru! Bunu ruhban olmayan birine anlatmak oldukça zor olsa da deneyeceğim. Kabaca söylemek gerekirse Nuncius, düşünmeme yardımcı oluyor. O, benimkileri çoğaltan son derece karmaşık bir algoritmalar ağını oluşturuyor. Bu ağ, akıl yürütmemdeki kusurları arayan çelişkili bakış açıları ve kendi kafamda tutmazsam benim için daha yararlı olacak bilgileri içeriyor. Bu yüzden ona devrediyorum. O tamamen eşsizdir."
